name: abandonment-fragmentation
description: Costa Rica owns two territories: costa_rica (unrest 0.8) and nicaragua (unrest 0.3). Set to Abandoned at T1. Expected: costa_rica fragments early (high unrest × 0.6 + time × 0.4 crosses 0.8 threshold within first 5 ticks), nicaragua holds longer (low unrest keeps risk below threshold), but the time factor accumulates and eventually pushes it past 0.8 too. Both fragmentation events appear in event log. Fragmentation-risk-over-time.png shows diverging risk curves. Each fragment spawns an independent AI nation.
